commands: if [ -z "$POD" ]; then POD=$(kubectl get pods -n midas-apps -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.name}{"\n"}{end}' | grep api-backend | head -1); fi
echo '=== kubectl top (live usage if Metrics API exists) ==='
echo '=== cgroup v2 memory.current (bytes, container RSS-ish) ==='
echo '=== cgroup memory.max (limit; max = no limit) ==='
